name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Place bar across upper back, squat to parallel or below, drive through heels.

name: Barbell Front Squat
instructions: Bar rests on front deltoids, elbows high, squat to depth.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Place feet shoulder-width on platform, lower sled with control, press back up.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hinge at hips with slight knee bend, lower bar along shins, squeeze glutes to stand.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Extend legs against pad until straight, control the negative.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Curl heels toward glutes against pad, control the eccentric.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot elevated on bench, lower until front thigh is parallel.

name: Walking Lunges
instructions: Step forward into lunge, alternate legs while walking forward.

name: Calf Raises
instructions: Rise onto toes, pause at top, lower with control.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Shoulders against pads, squat down on angled sled, drive up.

name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lower bar to mid-chest, press up in slight arc, lock out.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Bench at 30-45 degrees, lower bar to upper chest, press up.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Press dumbbells up from chest level, control the descent.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Bench at 30-45 degrees, press dumbbells from upper chest.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Arms wide with slight elbow bend, squeeze chest to bring dumbbells together.

name: Cable Crossover
instructions: Pull cables from high to low in hugging motion, squeeze at center.

name: Chest Dip
instructions: Lean forward, lower until stretch in chest, press back up.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Lower chest to floor, press back up, keep core tight.

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Press handles forward, control the return.

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Bring padded arms together in front of chest, squeeze, control return.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Hinge and grip bar, drive through floor, lock out hips and knees together.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge forward 45 degrees, row bar to lower chest/upper abs.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from bar, pull chin above bar, control the descent.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Supinated grip, pull chin above bar, emphasizes biceps.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Pull bar to upper chest, squeeze shoulder blades, control return.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Pull handle to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades together.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: One hand on bench, row dumbbell to hip, squeeze lat at top.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle bar, row handle to chest, keep back flat.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Pull rope to face level, externally rotate at end, squeeze rear delts.

name: Straight Arm Pulldown
instructions: Arms straight, pull bar down to thighs, squeeze lats.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Press bar overhead from front shoulders, lock out, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Press dumbbells overhead from shoulder level, control descent.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Raise dumbbells to sides until arms are parallel to floor.

name: Front Raise
instructions: Raise dumbbell in front to shoulder height, alternate or both.

name: Reverse Fly
instructions: Bent over, raise dumbbells out to sides, squeeze rear delts.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start with palms facing you, rotate and press overhead.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Pull bar up along body to chin level, elbows high.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Single arm, raise cable out to side to shoulder height.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Press handles overhead, control the return.

name: Shrugs
instructions: Shrug shoulders straight up toward ears, hold, lower.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Curl bar up keeping elbows at sides, control the negative.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Curl dumbbells alternating or together, squeeze at top.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Neutral grip curl, targets brachialis and forearms.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Arms on preacher bench, curl bar up, control descent.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Curl cable bar up, constant tension throughout range.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Push rope or bar down until arms are straight, squeeze triceps.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold dumbbell overhead, lower behind head, extend back up.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lower bar to forehead, extend arms, keep elbows pointed up.

name: Close Grip Bench Press
instructions: Narrow grip bench press emphasizing triceps.

name: Dip
instructions: Stay upright to target triceps, lower and press back up.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold push-up position on forearms, keep body straight.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from bar, raise legs to parallel or above.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel facing cable, crunch down bringing elbows to knees.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Roll wheel forward extending body, pull back to kneeling.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Seated, lean back, rotate torso side to side with weight.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Push-up position, alternate driving knees to chest rapidly.
